emails.subject: Re: Southern
emails.body: Any thoughts on how you would like to approach this? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 12/08/2000 09:53 AM Chris Gaffney 12/08/2000 09:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: Southern
emails.body: Any thoughts on how you would like to approach this? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 12/08/2000 09:53 AM Chris Gaffney 12/08/2000 09:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: Southern
emails.body: In order to minimize credit risk, I would rather keep all trades under one document. The cleanest way would be to amend the ISDA to a multicurrency so that we can do cross border trades, right? From: Tana Jones on 12/08/2000 09:56 AM
